requirement.description: When the vehicle speed exceeds a configured threshold, the gateway shall generate an overspeed warning condition.
requirement.python_test_setup:
import os
import time
import pytest
import can

MSG_ID_GW_WARNINGS = 0xD2
EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES = 5

@pytest.fixture(scope="module")
def can_bus():
    bus = can.interface.Bus(interface=os.getenv('CAN_INTERFACE', 'socketcan'), channel=os.getenv('CAN_CHANNEL', 'can0'), bitrate=500000)
    yield bus
    bus.shutdown()

def decode_overspeed_warning(data_bytes: bytes) -> int:
    # OverspeedWarning = bit 0 -> byte 0, bit 0
    return (data_bytes[0] >> 0) & 0x01

def collect_warning_messages(bus, duration_sec=2.0):
    msgs = []
    start = time.time()
    while time.time() - start < duration_sec:
        msg = bus.recv(timeout=0.2)
        if msg and msg.arbitration_id == MSG_ID_GW_WARNINGS:
            msgs.append(msg)
    return msgs

test_cases.title: Verify overspeed warning inactive below threshold
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; VehicleSpeed below threshold; Monitor CAN ID 0xD2
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_overspeed_001_below_threshold(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_warning_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES
    assert all(decode_overspeed_warning(m.data) == 0 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify overspeed warning activates above threshold
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; VehicleSpeed above threshold; Monitor CAN ID 0xD2
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_overspeed_002_above_threshold(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_warning_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES
    assert all(decode_overspeed_warning(m.data) == 1 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify immediate activation upon threshold crossing
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; VehicleSpeed initially below threshold; Monitor CAN ID 0xD2
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_overspeed_003_immediate_set(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_warning_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES
    states = [decode_overspeed_warning(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert 0 in states and 1 in states
    assert states[-1] == 1

test_cases.title: Verify overspeed warning clears below threshold
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Overspeed active; Monitor CAN ID 0xD2
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_overspeed_004_clear_below_threshold(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_warning_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES
    states = [decode_overspeed_warning(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert states[-1] == 0

test_cases.title: Verify overspeed warning remains active while above threshold
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; VehicleSpeed above threshold; Monitor CAN ID 0xD2
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_overspeed_005_persistent_above_threshold(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_warning_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES
    assert all(decode_overspeed_warning(m.data) == 1 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify overspeed warning does not trigger at exact threshold
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; VehicleSpeed equal to threshold; Monitor CAN ID 0xD2
steps: Set VehicleSpeed exactly equal to threshold
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_overspeed_006_at_threshold(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_warning_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES
    assert all(decode_overspeed_warning(m.data) == 0 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify correct reaction to fluctuating speed around threshold
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; VehicleSpeed alternates around threshold; Monitor CAN ID 0xD2
steps: Alternate speed below and above threshold
test_cases.expected_result: OverspeedWarning toggles correctly based on speed relative to threshold
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_overspeed_007_fluctuating_speed(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_warning_messages(can_bus, 4.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES
    states = [decode_overspeed_warning(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert 0 in states and 1 in states
